posts.highlight: 草莓变身小汤圆 · 身材比例满分
posts.description: Strawberry the Bichon with a perfectly round, fluffy body compared to a 1:1 joraengi-tteok Korean rice cake — the cutest ratio
posts.description_zh: 草莓比熊圆滚滚的身材被比作1:1的韩式汤圆糯米糕，萌力爆棚
posts.caption_zh:
致命好身材 1:1 小汤圆比例 🤍

#可爱狗狗 #比熊宝宝 #萌宠
posts.westie_prompt: A West Highland White Terrier, pure white fluffy fur, bright eyes, small black nose. Scene inspired by: Strawberry the Bichon with a perfectly round, fluffy body compared to a 1:1 joraengi-tteok Korean rice cake — the cutest ratio. Natural lighting, photorealistic, square composition, no text, no watermark.

posts.highlight: 棉花糖草莓 · 软软甜甜就是你
posts.description: Strawberry the Bichon looking exactly like fluffy sweet cotton candy, impossibly soft and round
posts.description_zh: 草莓比熊整个人就是棉花糖，蓬松软甜，看一眼就融化
posts.caption_en:
귀여운 솜방망이야 ᘏ⑅ᘏ ₊ ✩ ｡ ˚🤍
보송 달달 솜사탕 그 자체 🤍☁️🍓
posts.caption_zh:
你就是可爱的棉花球 ᘏ⑅ᘏ ₊ ✩ ｡ ˚🤍
蓬松香甜的棉花糖本体 🤍☁️🍓
